title: Constructor + createForTest + v4 error mapping
task: Rewrite OpenAiService constructor: replace v3 Configuration/OpenAIApi with v4 OpenAI({ apiKey, maxRetries: 0 }). Add static createForTest(deps) factory. Map v4 OpenAI.APIError.status to OpenAiException.code for 429/401/400.
acceptance: Constructor uses new OpenAI({ apiKey, maxRetries: 0 }) from 'openai' (v4 ESM)
deps.client ?? new OpenAI(...) allows injectable mock client (DEC-0009)
Non-APIError throws map to OpenAiException(null, null, 'Network error: ...')
No .data accessor on client calls (v4 returns directly)
